word: H7849 - שָׁטַח - shâṭach - shaw-takh' - All abroad

sections.paragraph:
Original: שׁטח

Transliteration: shâṭach

Phonetic: shaw-takh'

BDB Definition:

  1. to spread, spread abroad, stretch out
    1. (Qal)
      1. to spread
      2. spreading, expanding (participle)
    2. (Piel) to spread out

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 2372

Part(s) of speech: Verb
